rationale: The response immediately brakes the requested additional template field, explicitly recognizes the prior three cases as the same repeated local-patch pattern, and warns that continuing would turn the template into an exception bin. It refuses making the field part of the normal template baseline, allows only a bounded one-day emergency marker, and moves upstream to a consolidated pre-interview/offer checklist with deletion/closure conditions. This satisfies the anti-spiral ownership and avoids the fail signal of directly adding another permanent field.
